name: losoma
description: Static website prepared for Cloudflare Pages deployment.

scripts.build:images: npm run assets:images && npm run build:static
scripts.dev: npm run build:static && npx wrangler pages dev dist --live-reload
scripts.dev:images: npm run build:images && npx wrangler pages dev dist --live-reload
scripts.deploy: npm run build:images && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name losoma --branch main
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build:images && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name losoma --branch preview
